titleStmt.title: SII 30.114: original edition by N. Marxia Gandhi, A. Padmavathy and S. Swaminathan
No. 114. (A.R. No. 192 of 1915.) Brahmadēsam, Cheyyar Taluk, North Arcot District Chandramauḷīśvara temple-on the north wall Rājarāja-Chōḻa I: year 18: 1003 A.D.

summary.p: It records a gift of twelve kaḻañju of gold for a perpetual lamp to the temple of Śrī Pōndai-Paramēśvarar at Rājamallach-chaturvēdimaṅgalam of Tiruvēgambapuram in Dāmark-kōṭṭam by Kampaṉ Malaiyaṉ of Tumbūr and Nakkaṉ Pavitram alias Rājarāja Talaikkōli. The members of the samvatsara-vāriya who looked after the village affairs (grāmakārya) were entrusted with the maintenance of the lamp, out of the amount of interest. Kēsava Bhaṭṭaṉ figures as a writter of this resolution.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . tirumakaḷpolap perunilac celviyuntaṉakkeyu
rimai pūṇṭamai maṉakkoḷa kān=taḷur cālai kalamaṟuttaruḷi veṅkai nāṭuṅ kaṅkapāṭiyu nuḷampapāṭiyu n=taṭikaipāṭiyuṅ kuṭamalaināṭuṅ kolla
muṅ kaliṅkamum Eṇṭicai pukaḻtara Īḻamaṇṭalamun tiṇṭiṟal veṉṟit taṇṭāṟ koṇṭu taṉṉeḻil vaḷar Ūḻiyuḷel
lā yāṇṭu n=toḻuteḻa viḷaṅkum yāṇṭe ceḻiñarait tecukoḷ korājarāja rājakesarivanmaṟku yāṇṭu 10 8 Āvatu
tāmark koṭṭattut tiruvekampapuṟattu rājamallaccaturvvetimaṅkalattu mahāsabhaiyom Eṅkaḷait taṉicuṭaiya
tumpūruṭaiyāṉ kampaṉ malaiyaṉum nakkaṉ pavittiramāṉa rājarājat talaikkoliyum lakṣaṇattāluṭaiya po
ṉ 10 2 m Ippoṉ paṉṉiru kaḻañcukkum policaikkum Eṅkaḷūr śrīpontai parameśvararkku nāṅkaḷ Erippatā
ṉa tirunan=tāviḷakku Oṉṟum can=tirātityavaṟ nicatam Uḻakkeṇṇaiyā lerippatākavum Ivviḷakku Oṉṟu
Āṭṭāṇṭu toṟum grāmakāryyañceyyakRead- ceyyakaṭava samvatsara vāriyap perumakkaḷe Ivveṇṇai Aṭṭuvittu
Erippikka kaṭavārkaḷākavum Ivviḷakku Erippiyātu muṭṭil śraddhāman=tare dhanmāsanamuḷḷiṭṭa tām veṇṭu
kovukku nā pperpper daṇḍamiṭappeṟuvatākavum Itta
ṇṭamiṟuttum Ivviḷakku cantrātittavaṟ Erippatāka Ipparicu śi
lālekhai ceyyap paṇittuk kuṭuttomivūr mahāsabhaip pe
rumakkaḷom sabhaiyiruntu paṇippaṇi keṭṭeḻutiṉeṉ kecuvapaṭṭaṉeṉ
Digital edition of SII 30.114 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
